title: Title of the schema e.g. 'General information from R0 questionnaire'
description: Single line in plain English. No codes, no derivation logic. e.g. Dataset with tumour characteristics, outcome data, physical development variables along with Tissue micro array coordinates

x-provenance.x-dataRound: Only if applicable, e.g. 'R0'. Skip if the variable is not applicable

StudyID.description: Unique identifier for a person in Generations data
StudyID.x-description: This variable is created internally by the Generations study team and is a PII variable

TCode.description: Unique identifier for a person in pseudonymised data.
TCode.x-description: Participant-specific masking of ID to preserve privacy. The variable is used for data stored in RDS only

Categorical_Integer_Field.description: English summary of what this field captures.
Categorical_Integer_Field.x-description: More details on the variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

Categorical_String_Field.description: English summary of what this field captures.
Categorical_String_Field.x-description: More details on the variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

Tumour_size.x-description: Largest tumour dimension in millimetres which will be harmonised to Cancer Registry coding system

Date_of_birth.description: Date of birth of a person.
Date_of_birth.x-description: More details on date variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

Last_modified_time.description: Last modified timestamp for a record in the dataset
Last_modified_time.x-description: The valid timestamp is either 2018-11-13T20:20:39+00:00 or 2018-11-13T20:20:39Z

Year_of_diagnosis.description: Best estimate of tumour diagnosis year (per tumour).
Year_of_diagnosis.x-description: Best estimate of tumour diagnosis year calculated separately for each tumour using DIAGNOSIS_DATE

Free_Text_Field.x-description: More details on the variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

RegEx_Pattern_Field.description: String that starts with an alphabet and ends with a number
RegEx_Pattern_Field.x-description: Helps to check whether the data follows specified pattern or not

AgeEntry.x-description: Using ADOB in the General table in Mailing database, and when the questionnaire was received, values of 6 in the Events table, to create Age at Entry. This variable is derived directly from raw data and the references to variables it is derived from is not another schema, they are references to the SQL database->table->column.

ICD_CODE.description: ICD-10-O2 site code (4-character) for tumour site.
ICD_CODE.x-description: Primary ICD-10-O2 site code (4-character) describing the site of origin of the neoplasm. Source priority: 1) CancerRegistry.SITE_ICD10_O2 (Describes site of origin of the neoplasm); 2) FlaggingCancers.CancerICD (Cancer ICD code). Use the code as provided by the source without recoding. This field is per tumour (TUMOUR_ID). The ICD 9 codes are converted to ICD 10 by referencing https://seer.cancer.gov/tools/conversion/2022/ICD9CM%20to%20ICD10CM.FY2023.11.18.22.pdf (Last access date: 23/10/2025). These are derived in Path report data to link tumours across sources

Questionnaire_Field.x-question: Has your home address changed from the one at which we mailed you?
Questionnaire_Field.description: Whether the participant moved addresses since filling out the last questionnaire or not
Questionnaire_Field.x-description: More details on the variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

DOB_Shifted.description: Shifted date of birth for a participant
DOB_Shifted.x-description: Taken from the fields ADOB in the General SQL table in the Mailing database. This variable is derived directly from raw data and the references to variables it is derived from is not another schema, they are references to the SQL database->table->column.

Array_Field.description: History of some repeated event (one record per event).
Array_Field.x-description: More details on the variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

Array_Item_Number.description: Incident array number (1 = first, 2 = second, etc.).
Array_Item_Number.x-description: More details on year variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

Array_Item_Coded_Field.description: Description for this item within the repeated record.
Array_Item_Coded_Field.x-description: More details on year variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

Array_Item_Date.x-description: More details on year variable if applicable. Skip if the variable is not applicable

Sentinel_Value_Field.x-description: Allow one of these values: valid numeric value between 0–60, OR 9999 = not applicable, OR null = missing/invalid.

R0_BMI20.x-description: Body Mass Index (kg/m²). Age calculation done by reading in age at baseline. Set to 9999 (NA) if participant was not yet 20 at baseline or if participant was pregnant at 20 years old.
